titleStmt.title: SII 36.222: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 222. (A.R. No. 222 of 1910.) PĀḌI (Tiruvalidāyam), SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the west wall of the central shrine in the Tiruvallīśvara temple.

summary.p: Madurāntaka Pottappichchōḻa mentioned in this inscription could be identified with one of the feudatories of Rājarāja III and the year 33 cited in the inscription perhaps be the regnal year of his overlord (Rājarāja III).

Records an order of Madurāntaka Pottappichchōḻa to the Ūrār granting the income from the village (with the exclusion of old grants assigned as dēvadāṉa iṟaiyili) of Tiruvallidāyam for undertaking repair in the temple and for feeding the māhēshvaras. The inscription ends with the signature of Gaṇḍagōpala.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī maturāntaka pottappiccoḻaṉ Olai jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu puḻalk koṭṭattu Am
pattūr nāṭṭu tiruvallitāyattu Ūravar kaṇṭu taṅkaḷūr Iṟaiyili devatāṉaṅkaḷ nīkki muppat
tu mūṉṟāvatu mutal Uṭaiyār tiruvallitāyamuṭaiya nāyaṉāṟku tiruppaṇikkup pātiyum māhe
śvararakku Amutukkup pātiyumāka taṅkaḷūr sarvamānyamāka candrādittavarai celvatāka kuṭuttom
Ippaṭi ceyvate Ivai kaṇṭakopālaṉ Eḻuttu śrīmāheśvara rakṣai §
Digital edition of SII 36.222 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
